message:
feat(tui): add detail bar showing full selected item content (bd-3n1d)

Add a "Selected" detail bar between the main content and footer that
shows untruncated information for the currently selected item:

- Workers: full ID, host, status, slots, latency, build count
- Active builds: full command, worker, build ID, progress
- Build history: full command, worker, status, duration, exit code

The detail bar appears automatically when an item is selected and the
panel is not in log view. This solves truncation of long worker IDs,
hostnames, and build commands without requiring horizontal scrolling.

Implementation follows Option 1 from the bead spec (status bar on
selection) as the simpler and more discoverable approach.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
